creator: clefevre%no-spam@citeweb.net
text:
oops, I forgot the following lines in the Makefile of this
new port :

-----
Y2K=		http://www.gnu.org/software/year2000.html

XLIB_DEPENDS=	intl.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/gettext
-----

before GNU_CONFIGURE and

-----
post-install:
	install-info ${PREFIX}/info/gcal.info ${PREFIX}/info/dir
-----

before .include <bsd.port.mk>

also, the "Version required:" comment is no more needed.

sorry about that, I was tired when I made this port !

Cyrille.
-- 
home:mailto:clefevre@citeweb.net work:mailto:Cyrille.Lefevre@edf.fr
